signals.headline: Powell Confirms He'll Stay as Fed Chair Pro Tem Until Successor Confirmed Amid Trump Announcement of Pick Tomorrow** | Y
signals.raw:
Powell Confirms He'll Stay as Fed Chair Pro Tem Until Successor Confirmed Amid Trump Announcement of Pick Tomorrow** | YES | HIGH confidence[1][2][3]

Jerome Powell stated he will serve as Chair Pro Tem if his successor is not confirmed by the end of his term in May, per legal provisions, and has no intention of leaving the Fed Board until an ongoing investigation concludes with transparency[1][3]
